description_long: This skateboard features a well-worn wooden deck with a faded, multicolored graphic design that includes abstract shapes and patches of blue, white, and brown. The deck shows signs of heavy use, with visible scuffs, scratches, and some areas where the paint has worn away. The skateboard is equipped with four white, classic-style wheels attached to metallic trucks with a standard kingpin configuration, both showing signs of wear and dirt. The trucks are mounted with visible hardware, and the wheels appear to be made for street use, given their size and shape. The underside of the deck is the most visually detailed, while the top is not clearly visible, making it difficult to determine the grip tape pattern. This skateboard is typical of those found in urban environments, suitable for street skating and tricks.
description: A well-used skateboard with a faded, multicolored graphic deck, white street wheels, and metallic trucks, showing significant wear and urban character.
description_view_0: Side view showing the skateboard's concave wooden deck, worn graphic, and all four white wheels with metallic trucks visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded nose of the deck, the alignment of the trucks and wheels, and the faded graphic design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the deck's curvature, worn artwork, and the wheels and trucks from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail of the deck, the trucks, and the wheels, with the deck's graphic and wear patterns visible.
attribute_brand_logo: None clearly visible; some faded text and graphics on the deck, but no distinct brand logo identifiable.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The deck features a heavily worn, abstract graphic with patches of blue, white, and brown, including faded shapes and indistinct motifs, giving it a distressed, urban look.
attribute_wheel_type: Classic street wheels, white in color, medium size, no visible text or logos.
attribute_truck_style: Standard metallic trucks with a traditional kingpin, silver in color, showing signs of wear and dirt, no visible branding.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: None visible; the top of the deck is not clearly shown in the images.
